---
---

## Co-authors {.central}

[Davide Agnoletto](https://davideagno.github.io), University of Padova

[Emanuele Aliverti](https://emanuelealiverti.github.io), University of Padova

[Federico Camerlenghi](https://sites.google.com/unimib.it/camerlenghi-federico/home-page), University of Milano-Bicocca

[Antonio Canale](https://tonycanale.github.io), University of Padova

[Alessia Caponera](https://alessiacaponera.github.io), Luiss University

[Marta Catalano](https://martacatalano.github.io), Luiss University

[Paolo Cherubini](https://scholar.google.it/citations?user=xDkyPXUAAAAJ&hl=en), University of Pavia

[Riccardo Cogo](https://www.linkedin.com/in/riccardo-cogo-9039a6150/), University of Milano-Bicocca

[Francesco Denti](https://fradenti.github.io), University of Padova

[David Dunson](https://scholars.duke.edu/person/dunson), Duke University

[Daniele Durante](https://danieledurante.github.io/web/), Bocconi University

[Amy Herring](https://scholars.duke.edu/person/Amy.Herring), Duke University

[Ching-Lung Hsu](https://sites.duke.edu/ch408/), Duke University

[Stefano Favaro](http://sites.carloalberto.org/favaro/), University of Turin

[Alan Gelfand](https://scholars.duke.edu/person/alan), Duke University

[Lorenzo Ghilotti](https://lghilotti.github.io), University of Milano-Bicocca

[Sirio Legramanti](https://siriolegramanti.wordpress.com), University of Bergamo

[Antonio Lijoi](https://mypage.unibocconi.eu/antoniolijoi/), Bocconi University

[Otso Ovaskainen](https://researchportal.helsinki.fi/en/persons/otso-ovaskainen), University of Helsinki

[Sally Paganin](https://salleuska.github.io), Ohio State University

[Francesca Panero](https://francescapanero.github.io), London School of Economics

[Sonia Petrone](https://dec.unibocconi.eu/people/sonia-petrone), Bocconi University

[Luca Presicce](https://lucapresicce.github.io), University of Milano-Bicocca

[Igor Prünster](https://mypage.unibocconi.eu/igorpruenster/), Bocconi University

[Carlo Reverberi](https://neuromi.it/author/carlo-reverberi/), University of Milano-Bicocca

[Massimilano Russo](https://rmassimiliano.github.io), Ohio State University

[Bruno Scarpa](https://homes.stat.unipd.it/brunoscarpa.html), University of Padova

[Aldo Solari](https://aldosolari.github.io), Ca' Foscari University

[Andrea Sottosanti](https://andreasottosanti.github.io), University of Padova

[Nicola Torelli](https://scholar.google.it/citations?user=l5fIs0wAAAAJ&hl=en), University of Trieste

[Alessandro Zito](https://alessandrozito.github.io/web/), Harvard University
